title: Senator Rosilicie Ochoa Bogh (R-Yucaipa) has formally submitted several letter requests to Governor Newsom urging action on critical legislation passed by the California Legislatur
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: SB 1381 expands the scope of child pornography laws to include material generated using artificial intelligence.
SB 1381 ensures that AI-generated explicit content involving minors is treated with the seriousness it deserves.
SB 1831 adds depictions of minors created with artificial intelligence to California’s existing child pornography laws.
SB 1831 aims to combat the growing threat of AI-generated explicit content involving minors.
As AI technology advances, existing laws must evolve to protect children from new forms of exploitation.
